name: repo-guard
description: Executable repository policy enforcement via JSON Schema validation and diff-based rule checking

scripts.test: node tests/validate-schemas.mjs && node tests/test-diff-rules.mjs && node tests/test-markdown-contract.mjs && node tests/test-github-pr.mjs && node tests/test-hardening.mjs && node tests/test-anchor-extractors.mjs && node tests/test-integration-extractors.mjs && node tests/test-integration-diagnostics.mjs && node tests/test-integration-fixtures.mjs && node tests/test-trace-evidence-rules.mjs && node tests/test-policy-profiles.mjs && node tests/test-repo-root.mjs && node tests/test-init.mjs && node tests/test-release-ref.mjs && node tests/test-doctor.mjs && node tests/test-enforcement-mode.mjs && node tests/test-structured-output.mjs && node tests/test-pipeline.mjs && node tests/test-self-hosting.mjs
